fields.name: Apple iPhone 15 (128GB)
fields.description: The Apple iPhone 15 features the powerful A16 Bionic chip, a 48MP main camera, Dynamic Island, USB-C charging, and a stunning 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR display for exceptional performance and photography.

fields.name: Samsung Galaxy S23 (128GB)
fields.description: The Samsung Galaxy S23 delivers flagship performance with the Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 processor, a stunning 120Hz Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, a professional triple-camera system, and all-day battery life.

fields.name: Apple MacBook Air M2 (8GB/256GB)
fields.description: The Apple MacBook Air M2 combines exceptional performance with an ultra-thin and lightweight design. Powered by the Apple M2 chip, it delivers smooth multitasking, brilliant visuals, and outstanding battery life for students and professionals.

fields.name: Dell Inspiron 15 (Intel i5/8GB/512GB SSD)
fields.description: The Dell Inspiron 15 is designed for work, study, and entertainment. Powered by the 12th Gen Intel Core i5 processor with 8GB RAM and a fast 512GB SSD, it delivers smooth multitasking and reliable everyday performance.

fields.name: Seiko 5 Sports Automatic Watch (SRPD55K1)
fields.description: The Seiko 5 Sports SRPD55K1 is a stylish automatic watch featuring the reliable 4R36 movement, a durable stainless steel case, 100m water resistance, a Hardlex crystal, and a sporty black dial with luminous hands and markers.
highlights: Black Dial with LumiBrite Hands & Markers

fields.name: Cartier Tank Must Watch (Large Model)
fields.description: The Cartier Tank Must Watch is a timeless luxury timepiece featuring a polished stainless steel case, elegant silvered dial with Roman numerals, blued-steel sword-shaped hands, Swiss quartz movement, and a premium leather strap. Its iconic rectangular design makes it perfect for both formal and everyday wear.

fields.name: Nike Ebernon Low Sneakers
fields.description: The Nike Ebernon Low Sneakers combine classic 1980s basketball-inspired styling with modern comfort. Featuring a durable leather upper, cushioned insole, low-cut silhouette, and a rubber cupsole for superior traction, these sneakers are ideal for everyday casual wear. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}
highlights: Ideal for Casual and Daily Wear

fields.name: One8 Boom Rush Running Shoes
fields.description: The One8 Boom Rush Running Shoes are engineered for runners and fitness enthusiasts, featuring lightweight cushioning, a breathable mesh upper, responsive midsole, and durable rubber outsole for superior comfort and performance during daily runs, workouts, and active lifestyles.
highlights: Ideal for Running and Gym Workouts

fields.name: Montblanc Meisterstück Leather Wallet
fields.description: The Montblanc Meisterst�ck Leather Wallet is crafted from premium full-grain European leather, offering a sophisticated design with multiple card slots, dedicated cash compartments, and RFID protection. It combines timeless luxury with everyday functionality.

fields.name: Hidesign Genuine Leather Wallet
fields.description: The Hidesign Genuine Leather Wallet is handcrafted from premium vegetable-tanned leather, offering a sleek and durable design with multiple card slots, spacious cash compartments, and RFID protection. It is perfect for everyday use with a premium finish and timeless style.
highlights: Ideal for Daily and Formal Use

fields.name: Tommy Hilfiger Leather Wallet
fields.description: The Tommy Hilfiger Leather Wallet is crafted from premium genuine leather and features a sleek, minimalist design with multiple card slots, spacious cash compartments, and RFID protection. Finished with the iconic Tommy Hilfiger logo, it offers the perfect blend of style, durability, and everyday functionality.
highlights: Perfect for Everyday and Formal Use

fields.name: Ray-Ban Aviator Classic Sunglasses (Black)
fields.description: The Ray-Ban Aviator Classic Sunglasses feature premium black lenses, a lightweight metal frame, and 100% UV protection. Designed with the iconic aviator silhouette, these sunglasses offer timeless style, exceptional comfort, and crystal-clear vision for everyday wear.

fields.name: LINDBERG Air Titanium Rim Eyeglasses
fields.description: The LINDBERG Air Titanium Rim Eyeglasses are handcrafted in Denmark using ultra-lightweight titanium for exceptional comfort and durability. Featuring a screwless minimalist design, adjustable nose pads, and premium optical lenses, these eyeglasses combine luxury craftsmanship with modern elegance.
highlights: Protective Hard Case and Cleaning Cloth Included

fields.name: Voyage Black Lens Sunglasses
fields.description: The Voyage Black Lens Sunglasses feature a lightweight premium frame with polarized black lenses that provide 100% UV protection. Designed for everyday comfort and modern style, they offer excellent glare reduction and a durable construction suitable for driving, travel, and outdoor activities.
highlights: Suitable for Driving and Outdoor Use

fields.name: Daniel Klein Stainless Steel Bracelet
fields.description: The Daniel Klein Stainless Steel Bracelet features a sleek contemporary design crafted from premium stainless steel with a polished finish. Lightweight, durable, and comfortable to wear, it is the perfect accessory for casual, business, and formal occasions.
highlights: Suitable for Daily and Formal Wear

fields.name: Fossil Vintage Casual Leather Bracelet
fields.description: The Fossil Vintage Casual Leather Bracelet combines genuine braided leather with premium stainless steel accents for a timeless and rugged look. Designed for everyday comfort, this bracelet complements both casual and smart-casual outfits while offering durability and effortless style.

fields.name: Sonos Ace Wireless Headphones (White)
fields.description: The Sonos Ace Wireless Headphones deliver premium lossless audio, active noise cancellation, spatial audio with dynamic head tracking, and up to 30 hours of battery life. Designed with plush memory foam ear cushions and a lightweight frame, they provide exceptional comfort and immersive sound for music, movies, and calls.
highlights: Spatial Audio with Dynamic Head Tracking

fields.name: Marshall Major V Wireless Headphones (Black)
fields.description: The Marshall Major V Wireless Headphones deliver Marshall's signature sound with powerful custom-tuned dynamic drivers, Bluetooth LE Audio support, and an impressive battery life of over 100 hours. Featuring a foldable design, wireless charging capability, and a comfortable on-ear fit, they're ideal for music lovers on the go.
